name: ClawXKairos
description: Self-driving agent loop: tick scheduling, Sleep tool, kairos system prompt, background commands, and async sub-agents. Rides on existing heartbeat-wake infrastructure with zero source code changes.

maxTurnsPerSession.label: Max turns per session
maxTurnsPerSession.help: Safety limit: stop the kairos loop after this many consecutive turns (default: 50)

minSleepMs.label: Minimum sleep (ms)
minSleepMs.help: Shortest allowed sleep duration to prevent runaway loops (default: 5000)

maxSleepMs.label: Maximum sleep (ms)
maxSleepMs.help: Longest allowed sleep duration to prevent the agent appearing dead (default: 300000)

tickDelayMs.label: Tick delay (ms)
tickDelayMs.help: Delay before injecting the next tick, gives user messages a chance to preempt (default: 100)

autoBackgroundAfterMs.label: Auto-background after (ms)
autoBackgroundAfterMs.help: Shell commands running longer than this are automatically backgrounded (default: 30000)

startMode.label: Start mode
startMode.help: How the kairos loop is first triggered: on-message (wait for user), on-heartbeat (wait for first heartbeat interval), on-gateway-start (immediate cold start)

asyncSubagents.label: Async sub-agents
asyncSubagents.help: When true, sub-agent spawns are non-blocking (default: true)
